title: Le capitaine Craddock
writer: Rowland V. Lee, Hans Müller, Fritz Reck-Malleczewen
actors: Jean Murat, Käthe von Nagy, Charles Redgie
plot: The mystery passenger on Craddock's ship is his country's queen.When he loses money she's entrusted to him at roulette, he threatens to bomb Monte Carlo unless his loss is restored.
